# Functional Requirements — no-scenarios-spec

### FR-1: User registration

The system SHALL accept a registration form and persist the new account.

### FR-2: User login

The system SHALL authenticate a returning user and issue a session token.

### FR-3: Password reset

The system SHALL allow a user to reset their password via email confirmation.

### FR-4: Account deactivation

The system SHALL permit a user to permanently deactivate their own account.

### FR-5: Profile update

The system SHALL let an authenticated user edit their own profile fields.
